output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?contestant ?nationality(COUNT(?episode) AS ?numShows) WHERE {
  ?episode wdt:P179 wd:Q107639236 .
  ?episode wdt:P710 ?contestant .
  ?contestant wdt:P27 ?nationality .
}
GROUP BY ?contestant ?nationality
ORDER BY ASC(?numShows)
LIMIT 1
